# ui.welcome { #app.ui.welcome }

`ui.welcome`



## Functions

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [welcome_tab](#app.ui.welcome.welcome_tab) | UI for the welcome tab, including announcements and project overview. |

### welcome_tab { #app.ui.welcome.welcome_tab }

```python
ui.welcome.welcome_tab()
```

UI for the welcome tab, including announcements and project overview.
